description: Canonical data dictionary for all scored fields. Maps every scored item and sub-item to its source, CDI section, AWS section, data type, and computation method.
scope: All 65 scored items + 315 sub-items = 342 field entries (27 standalone Data/Comparative items + 315 sub-items within 38 Checklist items)

fields.name: Occupancy Rate
fields.computation: Occupied Units / Total Units

fields.name: Average Vacant Days
fields.computation: Sum of vacant days across all units that were vacant in period / count of those units

fields.name: Aged Vacancy
fields.computation: (Count of units vacant > 60 days / Total units) × 100

fields.name: Avg Review Score
fields.computation: Volume-weighted average across all platforms (Google, Yelp, Apartments.com, ApartmentRatings, Facebook)

fields.name: Review Volume
fields.computation: Total review count across all tracked platforms

fields.name: Review Recency (last 90d)
fields.computation: Count of reviews posted in last 90 days across all platforms

fields.name: Platform Coverage
fields.computation: Count of platforms where property has a profile with reviews

fields.name: GMB Claimed
fields.computation: Check Google Business Profile — is it claimed by the property?

fields.name: GMB Optimized
fields.computation: GMB has complete info: hours, photos, description, categories, services

fields.name: Social - Facebook
fields.computation: Property has an active Facebook page

fields.name: Social - Instagram
fields.computation: Property has an active Instagram account

fields.name: Social - TikTok
fields.computation: Property has an active TikTok account

fields.name: Social - LinkedIn
fields.computation: Property has a LinkedIn company page

fields.name: Audience Size
fields.computation: Total followers/likes across all active social platforms

fields.name: Post Consistency
fields.computation: Average posts per week across active platforms (sample last 30 days)

fields.name: Website Exists
fields.computation: Property has a dedicated website (not just an ILS listing)

fields.name: Mobile Responsive
fields.computation: Website renders correctly on mobile device

fields.name: Live Chat
fields.computation: Website has live chat or chatbot functionality

fields.name: Contact Form
fields.computation: Website has a working contact/inquiry form

fields.name: Floor Plans
fields.computation: Floor plan images or diagrams available on website

fields.name: Photo Gallery
fields.computation: Website has a photo gallery section

fields.name: Unit Availability
fields.computation: Website shows current available units with pricing

fields.name: Virtual Tours
fields.computation: Website offers virtual tour / 3D walkthrough of units

fields.name: Social Media Paid Ads
fields.computation: Property runs paid social media advertising campaigns

fields.name: Google Adwords
fields.computation: Property runs Google Ads / PPC campaigns

fields.name: Email/SMS Marketing
fields.computation: Property has email or SMS marketing campaigns for prospects/residents

fields.name: Referral Program Exists
fields.computation: Formal resident referral program in place

fields.name: Referral Incentive Offered
fields.computation: Monetary or other incentive offered for successful referrals

fields.name: Referral Tracking System
fields.computation: System exists to track referral sources and outcomes

fields.name: Local Business Partnerships
fields.computation: Partnerships with local businesses for cross-promotion

fields.name: Influencer/Creator Collaborations
fields.computation: Collaborations with social media influencers or content creators

fields.name: Co-Branded Content or Events
fields.computation: Joint content or events with partner organizations

fields.name: Corp Relocation Program Exists
fields.computation: Formal corporate relocation program in place

fields.name: RMC Partnerships
fields.computation: Active partnerships with Relocation Management Companies

fields.name: Corporate Rates/Packages
fields.computation: Special rates or packages for corporate relocations

fields.name: Furnished/Short-Term Options
fields.computation: Furnished or short-term lease options available for relocations

fields.name: Dedicated Relocation Contact
fields.computation: Named point of contact for relocation inquiries

fields.name: Broker Program Exists
fields.computation: Formal broker/locator program in place

fields.name: Broker Portal
fields.computation: Online portal for brokers to check availability and submit clients

fields.name: Broker Materials
fields.computation: Marketing materials specifically for brokers/locators

fields.name: Direct Broker Contact
fields.computation: Named direct contact for broker inquiries

fields.name: Broker Lead Tracking
fields.computation: System to track broker-referred leads and conversions

fields.name: Broker Events/Outreach
fields.computation: Events or outreach specifically targeting brokers/locators

fields.name: Cost per Lead
fields.computation: Total marketing spend (trailing 12 months) / total leads generated in same period. Marketing spend includes paid advertising + platform subscriptions + listing fees + monthly service costs.

fields.name: Lead-to-Tour %
fields.computation: Tours scheduled / total leads received

fields.name: Tour-to-App %
fields.computation: Applications submitted / tours completed

fields.name: App-to-Lease %
fields.computation: Leases signed / applications submitted

fields.name: Tour-to-Lease %
fields.computation: Leases signed / tours completed

fields.name: Lead-to-Lease %
fields.computation: Leases signed / total leads received

fields.name: Cancel Rate
fields.computation: Scheduled tours cancelled by prospect before appointment / total scheduled tours

fields.name: Ghost Rate
fields.computation: Scheduled tours where prospect did not show and did not cancel / total scheduled tours (excludes cancellations)

fields.name: Greeting: Prompt Acknowledgment
fields.computation: Auditor shadow — observed during tour

fields.computation: Auditor shadow — observed during tour

fields.name: Follow-Up: Contact Received
fields.computation: Secret shopper — did follow-up occur?

fields.name: Follow-Up: Was Personalized
fields.computation: Secret shopper — was follow-up personalized?

fields.name: Follow-Up: Referenced Visit Details
fields.computation: Secret shopper — did follow-up reference the visit?

fields.name: Follow-Up: Made Another Close Attempt
fields.computation: Secret shopper — did follow-up include close attempt?

fields.name: Email Response Time
fields.computation: Send test email inquiry, measure response time

fields.name: Phone Response Time
fields.computation: Place test call, measure callback time if not answered

fields.name: Follow-Up System
fields.computation: Is follow-up documented and/or automated?

fields.name: Follow-Up Volume
fields.computation: How many follow-up touches in the nurture sequence?

fields.name: After-Hours Handling
fields.computation: Call after hours — what happens?

fields.name: Weekend Handling
fields.computation: Call/visit on weekend — what's available?

fields.name: Advanced Programs
fields.computation: Nurture drip and/or re-engagement campaigns in place?

fields.name: Expectations Communicated
fields.computation: Leasing process expectations set with applicants upfront

fields.name: Online Application Available
fields.computation: Application can be completed online

fields.name: Mobile-Friendly Application
fields.computation: Application works on mobile device

fields.name: Application Status Communication
fields.computation: Applicants notified of status updates during processing

fields.name: Credit Check Performed
fields.computation: Credit check is part of screening

fields.name: Background Check Performed
fields.computation: Criminal background check is part of screening

fields.name: Income Verification Performed
fields.computation: Income verification is part of screening

fields.name: Rental History Verification
fields.computation: Prior landlord references checked

fields.name: Employment Verification
fields.computation: Employment verified during screening

fields.name: Electronic Lease Signing
fields.computation: Leases can be signed electronically

fields.name: Clear Move-In Cost Breakdown
fields.computation: Itemized move-in costs provided to applicant

fields.name: Deposit/Fee Payment Online
fields.computation: Deposits and fees can be paid online

fields.name: Move-In Date Scheduling Process
fields.computation: Defined process for scheduling move-in date

fields.name: Pre-Move-In Unit Inspection
fields.computation: Unit inspected before resident move-in

fields.name: Move-In Checklist Provided
fields.computation: Resident receives move-in condition checklist

fields.name: Utility Setup Guidance
fields.computation: Guidance provided for utility transfers/setup

fields.name: Key/Access Handoff Process
fields.computation: Defined process for key/fob/access handoff

fields.name: Welcome Package Provided
fields.computation: New resident welcome package provided

fields.name: New Resident Orientation
fields.computation: In-person or virtual orientation for new residents

fields.name: Resident Portal Setup Assistance
fields.computation: Staff assists new resident with portal/app setup

fields.name: Community Rules & Policies Reviewed
fields.computation: Rules and policies reviewed with new resident

fields.name: Emergency Procedures Communicated
fields.computation: Emergency contacts and procedures provided

fields.name: Amenity Walkthrough During Onboarding
fields.computation: New resident given amenity walkthrough

fields.name: App Processing Speed
fields.computation: Average time from application submission to processing complete

fields.name: Screening Processing Speed
fields.computation: Average time for screening results

fields.name: Approval Speed
fields.computation: Average time from screening to approval decision

fields.name: Lease Turnaround
fields.computation: Average time from approval to executed lease

fields.name: Formal Program Exists
fields.computation: Documented training program exists

fields.name: Onboarding Duration
fields.computation: Length of new hire onboarding program

fields.name: Ongoing Frequency
fields.computation: How often ongoing training occurs

fields.name: Coaching Frequency
fields.computation: How often one-on-one coaching sessions occur

fields.name: Certifications Required
fields.computation: Industry certifications required or encouraged

fields.name: Product Knowledge Training
fields.computation: Training on property features, amenities, neighborhood

fields.name: Sales/Closing Training
fields.computation: Training on sales techniques and closing

fields.name: Fair Housing Training
fields.computation: Fair housing compliance training provided

fields.name: CRM/Systems Training
fields.computation: Training on CRM and other technology systems

fields.name: Other Training Programs
fields.computation: Additional training programs (customer service, conflict resolution, etc.)

fields.name: Scheduling Methods
fields.computation: Count of available scheduling methods (phone, email, online, walk-in)

fields.name: Online Self-Booking
fields.computation: Prospects can self-schedule tours online

fields.name: Availability (Weekend/Evening)
fields.computation: Tours available weekends and/or evenings?

fields.name: Broker Scheduling Access
fields.computation: Brokers can schedule tours directly

fields.name: Flexibility (Same-day/Walk-ins)
fields.computation: Same-day tours and/or walk-ins accepted?

fields.name: Accessibility
fields.computation: Parking availability + signage/wayfinding to leasing office

fields.name: Hours Coverage
fields.computation: Days per week office is open

fields.name: Seating Available
fields.computation: Guest seating in leasing office

fields.name: Refreshments
fields.computation: Water, coffee, or other refreshments offered

fields.name: WiFi
fields.computation: Guest WiFi available in leasing office

fields.name: Restroom
fields.computation: Restroom accessible to prospects

fields.name: Professional Setup
fields.computation: Leasing office has marketing materials + technology setup

fields.name: Wayfinding Signage
fields.computation: Clear signage directing to leasing office from entrance

fields.name: Model Available
fields.computation: Designated model unit available for tours

fields.name: Model Quality
fields.computation: Model unit furnishing and staging level

fields.name: Model Positioning
fields.computation: Does model represent a typical unit or the best-case scenario?

fields.name: Platform Count
fields.computation: Count platforms where property is actively listed

fields.name: ILS Coverage
fields.computation: Presence on Apartments.com and Zillow specifically

fields.name: Update Frequency
fields.computation: How often listings are updated (real-time sync vs manual)

fields.name: Management Quality
fields.computation: Who manages listings (in-house, PM company, external agency)

fields.name: Syndication Method
fields.computation: Centralized feed vs partial vs manual per-platform

fields.name: Hero Image Present
fields.computation: Strong hero/featured image on primary listing

fields.name: Exterior Coverage (5+)
fields.computation: At least 5 exterior photos across listings

fields.name: Unit Interior (all rooms/types)
fields.computation: Interior photos covering all rooms and unit types

fields.name: Amenity Coverage
fields.computation: Percentage of amenities photographed

fields.name: Lifestyle Shots (5+)
fields.computation: At least 5 lifestyle/staging photos

fields.name: Professional Photographer
fields.computation: Photos taken by professional photographer

fields.name: Photo Recency
fields.computation: When were listing photos last updated?

fields.name: Unique Selling Points Mentioned
fields.computation: Listing description highlights property differentiators

fields.name: Neighborhood Context Included
fields.computation: Description mentions neighborhood, nearby amenities, transit

fields.name: Call-to-Action Included
fields.computation: Description includes clear CTA (schedule tour, apply, call)

fields.name: Contact Info Clear
fields.computation: Phone, email, or contact method clearly displayed

fields.name: Floor Plans Available
fields.computation: Floor plan images on listing

fields.name: Unit Specs Accurate
fields.computation: Square footage, bed/bath count accurate

fields.name: Amenities Fully Listed
fields.computation: All community and unit amenities listed

fields.name: Pet Policy Stated
fields.computation: Pet policy clearly stated on listing

fields.name: Lease Terms Mentioned
fields.computation: Available lease terms mentioned

fields.name: Pricing Accurate Across Platforms
fields.computation: Compare pricing on 3+ platforms — consistent?

fields.name: Availability Accurate
fields.computation: Listed availability matches actual availability

fields.name: Unit Types/Sizes Correct
fields.computation: Unit types and square footages match reality

fields.name: Amenities List Accurate
fields.computation: Listed amenities match what's actually available

fields.name: Photos Match Property Condition
fields.computation: Photos accurately represent current property condition

fields.name: Specials Updated
fields.computation: Advertised specials/promotions are current

fields.name: Contact Info Current
fields.computation: Phone numbers, emails, office hours are correct

fields.name: Loss-to-Lease %
fields.computation: (Comp-derived market rent - In-Place Rent) / Comp-derived market rent, across all occupied units. Market rent is established from auditor-collected comp set data, not the property's internal rent matrix.

fields.name: New Leases (12mo) — Avg PPSF vs Market Avg PPSF
fields.computation: Average PPSF of leases signed in last 12 months vs comp set average PPSF

fields.name: Concession % of GPR
fields.computation: Total free rent concession value / Gross Potential Rent. Concessions = free rent only.

fields.name: Rent Lift on Turnover
fields.computation: (New lease rent - previous tenant rent) / previous tenant rent, averaged across all turnovers. Date range: assessment-level variable.

fields.name: Net Effective vs Asking Gap
fields.computation: (Asking Rent - Net Effective Rent) / Asking Rent, averaged across all current leases. Date range: assessment-level variable.

fields.name: Renewal Rent Increase
fields.computation: Average % rent increase on renewed leases. Date range: assessment-level variable.

fields.name: Renewal Rate
fields.computation: Leases renewed / leases expiring in period

fields.name: Average Resident Tenure
fields.computation: Average months of residency across all current residents

fields.name: Month-to-Month %
fields.computation: Units on month-to-month leases / total occupied units

fields.name: Controllable Turnover Rate
fields.computation: Move-outs due to controllable reasons / total units. Controllable: maintenance/condition issues, noise/neighbor complaints, management dissatisfaction, pest issues, safety concerns, rent increase, amenity/service complaints.

fields.name: DNR Rate
fields.computation: Do-Not-Renew notices issued / total expiring leases

fields.name: Defined Renewal Process Exists
fields.computation: Documented renewal process in place

fields.name: Renewal Offer Communicated in Writing
fields.computation: Renewal offers sent in writing (email/letter)

fields.name: Renewal Pricing Strategy Defined
fields.computation: Defined strategy for setting renewal rent increases

fields.name: Resident Satisfaction Assessed Before Renewal
fields.computation: Satisfaction check before renewal offer sent

fields.name: Renewal Negotiation Flexibility
fields.computation: Staff has authority/guidelines to negotiate renewal terms

fields.name: Electronic Renewal Signing Available
fields.computation: Renewals can be signed electronically

fields.name: Proactive Retention Outreach Program
fields.computation: Proactive outreach to residents beyond renewal notices

fields.name: Retention Incentives Offered
fields.computation: Incentives offered to encourage renewal

fields.name: Resident Feedback/Survey Program
fields.computation: Regular satisfaction surveys conducted

fields.name: Exit Interview / Move-Out Survey
fields.computation: Exit interviews or move-out surveys conducted

fields.name: DNR Review Process Exists
fields.computation: Formal review process before issuing DNR

fields.name: DNR Criteria Documented
fields.computation: Written criteria for when to issue DNR

fields.name: DNR Decisions Reviewed by Management
fields.computation: DNR decisions reviewed/approved by management

fields.name: DNR Communication Timeline Defined
fields.computation: Defined timeline for communicating DNR to resident

fields.name: Occupied Apartment Program Exists
fields.computation: Program to show/prepare units before current resident moves out

fields.name: Non-Renewal Triggers Showing Communication
fields.computation: Non-renewal triggers communication to begin showing unit

fields.name: Pre-Move-Out Unit Assessment
fields.computation: Unit assessed before move-out for make-ready planning

fields.name: Move-Out Checklist Provided
fields.computation: Move-out checklist provided to departing resident

fields.name: Outreach Timeline
fields.computation: How many days before lease expiration does renewal outreach begin?

fields.name: NTV Response Speed
fields.computation: How quickly does management respond to a Notice to Vacate?

fields.name: Units per Leasing Agent
fields.computation: Total units / leasing staff FTE

fields.name: Units per Maintenance Tech
fields.computation: Total units / maintenance technician FTE

fields.name: Staff Turnover Rate
fields.computation: Staff departures in trailing 12mo / average headcount

fields.name: Average Staff Tenure
fields.computation: Average months of employment across all current staff

fields.name: PM Tenure
fields.computation: How long current property manager has been in role

fields.name: Open Position Rate
fields.computation: Open/unfilled positions / total budgeted positions

fields.name: Coverage Breadth
fields.computation: Count of technology categories in use

fields.name: Capability Depth
fields.computation: Auditor assesses how fully each system is utilized

fields.name: Integration Quality
fields.computation: Count of system-to-system integrations

fields.name: Staff Mobile Access
fields.computation: Staff can access key systems via mobile devices

fields.name: Resident Mobile Access
fields.computation: Residents have a mobile app for payments, maintenance, etc.

fields.name: Automation Level
fields.computation: Level of workflow automation

fields.name: System Efficiency
fields.computation: Level of system redundancy

fields.name: Tech Spend ROI
fields.computation: Total technology spend / total units

fields.name: Fire/Safety Inspection Current
fields.computation: Most recent fire/safety inspection is current and passed

fields.name: No Open Code Violations
fields.computation: No unresolved code violations on file

fields.name: ADA Compliance Met
fields.computation: Property meets ADA requirements

fields.name: Insurance Current
fields.computation: Property insurance policy is active and current

fields.name: Gross Potential Rent
fields.computation: Actual GPR vs owner's benchmark/budget GPR

fields.name: Vacancy Loss
fields.computation: Actual vacancy loss vs owner's budgeted vacancy loss

fields.name: Concessions / Loss-to-Lease
fields.computation: Actual concession spend vs owner's budget

fields.name: Other Income
fields.computation: Actual other income vs owner's budget

fields.name: Effective Gross Income
fields.computation: Actual EGI vs owner's budgeted EGI

fields.name: Payroll & Benefits
fields.computation: Actual payroll vs budget

fields.name: Repairs & Maintenance
fields.computation: Actual R&M spend vs budget

fields.name: Utilities
fields.computation: Actual utilities vs budget

fields.name: Marketing & Advertising
fields.computation: Actual marketing spend vs budget

fields.name: Insurance
fields.computation: Actual insurance cost vs budget

fields.name: Real Estate Taxes
fields.computation: Actual tax expense vs budget

fields.name: Admin / G&A
fields.computation: Actual G&A vs budget

fields.name: Contract Services
fields.computation: Actual contract services vs budget

fields.name: Management Fee
fields.computation: Actual management fee vs budget/contract

fields.name: Total Operating Expenses
fields.computation: Actual total OpEx vs budget

fields.name: Net Operating Income
fields.computation: Actual NOI vs owner's budgeted NOI

fields.name: Capital Expenditures
fields.computation: Actual CapEx vs budgeted CapEx

fields.name: Capital Reserves
fields.computation: Current reserve balance vs target reserve balance

fields.name: Emergency Response Time
fields.computation: Average time from emergency work order submission to first response

fields.name: Routine Response Time
fields.computation: Average time from routine work order submission to first response

fields.name: Work Order Completion Rate
fields.computation: Completed work orders / total work orders submitted in period

fields.name: Avg Work Order Completion Duration
fields.computation: Average days from work order submission to completion

fields.name: Callback / Repeat Work Order Rate
fields.computation: Work orders for same issue code in same unit recurring within the lease term / total completed work orders.

fields.name: Preventive vs Reactive Ratio
fields.computation: Preventive/scheduled work orders / total work orders

fields.name: Formal Request System
fields.computation: Structured work order system exists

fields.name: Maintenance Process Documentation
fields.computation: Written SOPs for maintenance processes

fields.name: Parts Inventory System
fields.computation: Common parts stocked on-site with tracking system

fields.name: Make-Ready Duration
fields.computation: Average days from move-out to unit listed as market-ready

fields.name: Make-Ready Cost
fields.computation: Average direct cost per unit turnover (labor + materials + vendor invoices). Excludes overhead and staff time.

fields.name: Overall Condition Rating
fields.computation: Auditor's overall assessment of property physical condition

fields.name: Common Areas Rating
fields.computation: Condition of lobbies, hallways, stairwells, laundry rooms

fields.name: Exterior Presentation
fields.computation: Grounds, parking, signage, lighting, landscaping, facades

fields.name: Amenities Condition Rating
fields.computation: Condition of pool, gym, clubhouse, dog park, playgrounds, business center

fields.name: Issues Count
fields.computation: Count of observable physical issues during site walk

fields.name: Roof
fields.computation: Visual inspection + management-reported age and last service date

fields.name: HVAC Systems
fields.computation: System age, performance complaints, last service date

fields.name: Plumbing
fields.computation: Pipe material, visible leaks, water pressure test, reported issues

fields.name: Electrical
fields.computation: Panel condition, wiring age, capacity concerns

fields.name: Siding / Facade
fields.computation: Visual inspection of exterior walls, siding, brick condition

fields.name: Windows
fields.computation: Seal integrity, condensation, operability, age

fields.name: Parking Surfaces
fields.computation: Lot/garage condition, striping, drainage, cracking

fields.name: Elevators
fields.computation: Condition, inspection currency, reported issues. N/A if no elevators

fields.name: Water Heaters
fields.computation: Age, type (tank/tankless, individual/central), condition

fields.name: Fire/Life Safety Systems
fields.computation: Sprinklers, alarms, extinguishers, emergency lighting condition

fields.name: Number of Deferred Items
fields.computation: Count of distinct deferred maintenance items identified during site walk

fields.name: Critical Systems Affected
fields.computation: Any deferred items on major systems (roof, HVAC, plumbing, electrical, structural)?

fields.name: Safety Hazards Present
fields.computation: Any deferred items creating safety risks?

fields.name: Flooring
fields.computation: Average rating across all sampled vacant units

fields.name: Walls / Paint
fields.computation: Average rating across all sampled vacant units

fields.name: Kitchen Cabinets & Countertops
fields.computation: Average rating across all sampled vacant units

fields.name: Kitchen Appliances
fields.computation: Average rating across all sampled vacant units

fields.name: Bathroom Fixtures & Tile
fields.computation: Average rating across all sampled vacant units

fields.name: Windows & Blinds
fields.computation: Average rating across all sampled vacant units

fields.name: Doors & Hardware
fields.computation: Average rating across all sampled vacant units

fields.name: Lighting Fixtures
fields.computation: Average rating across all sampled vacant units

fields.name: HVAC (in-unit)
fields.computation: Average rating across all sampled vacant units

fields.name: Overall Cleanliness
fields.computation: Average rating across all sampled vacant units

fields.name: General Finish Level
fields.computation: Average rating across all sampled vacant units

fields.name: Studio — Avg Price vs Comps
fields.computation: Subject studio avg rent / comp set studio avg rent

fields.name: Studio — PPSF vs Comps
fields.computation: Subject studio PPSF / comp set studio avg PPSF

fields.name: 1-Bed — Avg Price vs Comps
fields.computation: Subject 1BR avg rent / comp set 1BR avg rent

fields.name: 1-Bed — PPSF vs Comps
fields.computation: Subject 1BR PPSF / comp set 1BR avg PPSF

fields.name: 2-Bed — Avg Price vs Comps
fields.computation: Subject 2BR avg rent / comp set 2BR avg rent

fields.name: 2-Bed — PPSF vs Comps
fields.computation: Subject 2BR PPSF / comp set 2BR avg PPSF

fields.name: Amenity Count vs Comps
fields.computation: Subject amenity count / comp set average amenity count

fields.name: Reputation Score vs Comps
fields.computation: Subject avg review score minus comp set avg review score

fields.name: Mystery Shop Score vs Comps
fields.computation: Subject mystery shop score / comp set avg mystery shop score. All comps mystery-toured with same checklist.

fields.name: Occupancy vs Comps
fields.computation: Subject occupancy rate minus comp set avg occupancy rate

fields.name: Resident Services vs Comps
fields.computation: Subject resident services count / comp set avg resident services count

fields.name: Resident Events vs Comps
fields.computation: Subject events frequency / comp set avg events frequency

fields.name: Resident Mobile App vs Comps
fields.computation: Subject has app (1 or 0) vs comp set adoption rate (% of comps with app)

fields.name: Delinquency Rate
fields.computation: Units with outstanding balance 30+ days past due / total occupied units

fields.name: Bad Debt Write-Off Rate
fields.computation: Total bad debt written off / total rent billed in period

fields.name: Eviction Rate
fields.computation: Eviction filings in period / total occupied units. If assessment date range < 12 months, annualize: (rate / months in period) × 12.

fields.name: Application Denial Rate
fields.computation: Applications denied / total applications received

fields.name: Short-Tenure Turnover Rate
fields.computation: Move-outs before lease term ends / total move-outs. Any early termination regardless of how far into the lease.

fields.name: Defined Screening Criteria Documented
fields.computation: Written screening criteria exist

fields.name: Credit Check Required
fields.computation: Credit check is mandatory for all applicants

fields.name: Background Check Required
fields.computation: Background check is mandatory for all applicants

fields.name: Income Verification Required
fields.computation: Income verification is mandatory

fields.name: Rental History Verification Required
fields.computation: Prior landlord references required

fields.name: Employment Verification Required
fields.computation: Employment verification required

fields.name: Consistent Application of Criteria
fields.computation: Same screening standards applied to all applicants (fair housing)

fields.name: Adverse Action Notice Process
fields.computation: Formal adverse action notice process for denied applicants
